query_text: lightweight freeride ski with good playfulness and powder float

results.explanation: Black Crows Atris excels in: playfulness, powder_float. Review: "More playful than heavy titanal powder skis." Review: "Playfulness is incredible, you can butter and smear everywhere." Review: "The Atris is a powder dream. At 108mm with generous rocker, it floats effortlessly."
Salomon QST 106 excels in: playfulness, powder_float. Review: "Playful enough for drops and airs." Review: "Damp, playful, floaty." Review: "Floats beautifully in powder at 106mm."

Dynastar M-Free 108 excels in: playfulness, powder_float. Review: "more playful." Review: "The playfulness is nice — lets you throw in some style." Review: "The M-Free 108 is well-balanced between float and grip."

Moment Wildcat 108 excels in: playfulness, powder_float. Review: "The maple/triax construction gives it a unique blend of power and playfulness." Review: "More chargy than the Atris but more playful than the Mindbender." Review: "Float is excellent at 108mm with rocker."
K2 Mindbender 108Ti excels in: powder_float. Solid on: playfulness. Review: "Decent playfulness for a charger." Review: "this is not a playful noodle." Review: "At 108mm it floats well in powder"

ground_truth.reason: Carbon/flax keeps weight down (1900g), playfulness 7, float 8
